product.notFoundDesc: This item does not exist or has been removed.

checkout.title: Complete your order
checkout.name: Full name (required)
checkout.namePhoneRequired: Name and phone are required to confirm.
checkout.namePhoneAddrRequired: Name, phone and a complete address (select a suggestion) are required.
checkout.noAccountNeeded: No account required. Fill in your details. Your address will be pre-filled on your next order.

appointment.title: Book appointment
appointment.intro: A message will be automatically generated with your cart contents. You can copy it and message us on Instagram.
appointment.name: Your name (optional)
appointment.afterSend: After sending your message, we will contact you to confirm the date and time of the appointment.
appointment.greeting: Hello, I would like to book an appointment for these items:

faq.a: Contact us via Instagram to place an order.
Jewelry is handmade, allow 1 to 2 weeks.
Yes, within 14 days if the item is intact.

faq.q: How to care for my jewelry?
faq.a: Avoid water and perfumes, store them in their pouch.

login.title: LOG IN
login.success: Account created! Check your email to confirm.

completion.successDesc: Thank you for your order! You will receive a confirmation email.
completion.processingDesc: Your payment is being processed. Please wait…
completion.failedDesc: The payment could not be processed. Please try again.

canceled.title: Order canceled
canceled.desc: Your order has been canceled. No amount has been charged.

landing.manifesto1: Because certain emotions deserve to be eternal. Each creation is designed to stand the test of time.
landing.manifesto2: Unique pieces, made-to-measure creations and signature collections in confidential editions.
landing.discoverCollection: Discover the One Day Only collection
landing.gridIntro: Unique models and numbered signature pieces. Click to discover the details and be guided for purchase or a made-to-measure creation in Paris.
landing.allCollectionsDesc: Since 1996, Marie Gabison has been designing necklaces, earrings and bracelets — almost always as unique pieces or made-to-measure. Signature numbered pieces remain in confidential quantities.
landing.artOfUnique: The art of the unique piece
landing.brandStoryDesc: Since 1996, Marie Gabison has been creating exceptional jewelry in Paris, in unique and made-to-measure pieces. Today, the Maison's iconic creations are revealed in numbered Signature Collections.
landing.contactDesc1: To acquire a unique model, a limited edition, or consider a made-to-measure creation in Paris, you can contact us by email at
landing.contactDesc2: or reach us on WhatsApp at
landing.contactNote: Made-to-meure is only available by appointment in Paris.
landing.footerRights: © {year} Marie Gabison Paris — All rights reserved
